body: This PR attempts to fix the non-unique job IDs for testing MPI restart capability
title: Try fixing non-unique job IDs

body: This PR refactors the ref state by splitting out the part that computes the ODE solution, which no longer uses edmf internals.
title: Refactor compute_ref_state
